_doc: Error logs for the NightlyBilling job — an Orchestrator 503 at job start, then automatic recovery noted afterward. The transient, infrastructure-level nature (503, self-recovering) is consistent with a platform incident, not an automation bug.

Data.Message: Job 'ddff7788-99aa-00bb-11cc-22dd33445566' failed to start. The remote server returned an error: (503) Server Unavailable.
[Robot] Received HTTP 503 from Orchestrator gateway while requesting job start; upstream service temporarily unavailable.
